name: Fast_Attack
description: Preform fast melee attacks with either sword.

name: Strong_Attack
description: Allows you to perform strong melee attacks which ignores enemy armor.

name: Marksmanship
description: Allows you to wield a light hand-held crossbow.

name: Battle_Trance
description: Blows landed during combat generate Adrenaline Points. Each Adrenaline Point increases weapon damage by 10%.

name: Aard
description: A directed blast of telekinetic energy that staggers opponents, leaving them open for a subsequent attack.

name: Igni
description: A directed fiery blast that damages enemies. Damage scales with Sign intensity.

name: Yrden
description: Magic trap that slows enemies who enter its area of effect.

name: Quen
description: Protective shield that lasts until it has absorbed damage totaling 5% of maximum Vitality.

name: Axii
description: Charms an opponent's mind, temporarily eliminating him from combat.

name: Brewing
description: Enables the brewing and drinking of witcher Potions.

name: Oil_Preparation
description: Enables the creation of Oils that can be applied to swords.

name: Bomb_Creation
description: Enables the creation of handheld Bombs that can be thrown at enemies.

name: Mutation
description: Enables the extraction of Mutagens from the corpses of powerful Monsters. Witchers use these to grant their bodies new abilities.

name: Trial_of_the_Grasses
description: Mutation that lets witchers withstand the Toxicity of Potions that would kill normal people.
